engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is evaluating physical products (knit fabrics) — categories, materials (Pima cotton, Modal, BCI cotton), prices and proof of variety. It sells THINGS, not a person's expertise nor a browsable-photos-are-the-decision place.

goal.one_action: browse the fabric catalog and place a wholesale order / contact sales to buy (min 1 roll ~12.5kg)

structure.archetype_note: WooCommerce B2B wholesale storefront: multi-page catalog with prices + cart/checkout + how-to-buy/payment terms + contact form. Job is commerce (inventory + checkout), not one conversion action → out of ICP.

mapped.observed_as: Sobre nós / Materiais em destaque (Pima, Modal, BCI cotton)
Sobre Nós (founded 1987, own factory, 60+ machines, 100 employees)
Como Comprar / Formas de Pagamento / Entrega

unmapped.observed: Todos os Produtos — full 330+ SKU product grid with price ranges
unmapped.why_no_fit: A live purchasable product catalog with per-item prices and cart is commerce, not a marketing section; no canonical section id expresses an inventory-backed storefront listing

unmapped.observed: Minimum purchase notice (1 closed roll ~12.5kg) & delivery-weight-minimum rules
unmapped.why_no_fit: Wholesale order-constraint / logistics terms — no canonical section captures B2B MOQ/delivery rules

unmapped.observed: Cartelas de Cores (color swatch charts nav item)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A color-swatch/reference resource for fabric buyers is not a marketing section

proposed_new.name: storefront-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: WooCommerce cart/checkout with prices_shown + cart_or_checkout true across 330+ SKUs; on-site transaction, not browse-only catalog

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; 6 pages captured with sections, forms, CTAs, commerce flags and oddities all consistent with a B2B WooCommerce wholesale storefront

gap_findings: Out of ICP: site's job is inventory-backed commerce (cart/checkout + 330 SKUs), not one conversion action — engines/sections cannot express a storefront listing.
B2B wholesale MOQ / delivery-weight-minimum / boleto financing terms have no canonical section — recurring for manufacturer/wholesaler ICP.
storefront-checkout (registry canonical) is the operative capability; catalog alone understates that this transacts on-site.
